user.title: Connect to ESPHome Fleet
user.description: Enter the base URL of your ESPHome Fleet add-on (for example `http://homeassistant.local:8765`).

discovery_confirm.title: Confirm discovered server
discovery_confirm.description:
Found {name}. Confirm or edit the URL.
Suggested URL: {url}

cancel.name: Cancel
cancel.description: Cancel a queued or running compile job.

validate.name: Validate
validate.description: Run ESPHome config validation on a target YAML.
